title: Expenses of indenture part of cost
doc_html:
§876.  Expenses of indenture part of cost

All expenses incurred in carrying out a trust indenture may be treated as a part of the cost of maintenance and operation of the bridge or bridges affected by the indenture.
doc_text:
§876.  Expenses of indenture part of cost
All expenses incurred in carrying out a trust indenture may be treated as a part of the cost of maintenance and operation of the bridge or bridges affected by the indenture.
